sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59619" key="krambofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κραμβο-φάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n59619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cabbage-eater</tr_>, name of a frog, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:218" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">218</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
